name: Stir-Fried String Beans Shanghai Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim, wash, and parboil the beans for 2 minutes in rapidly boiling water. Drain and rinse with cold water.
2. Heat sesame seeds in a dry frying pan over moderate heat until they begin to pop. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. Combine sugar, rice wine vinegar, white pepper, light soy sauce, sesame oil, and MSG in a small bowl for the seasoning mixture.
4. Place a wok on high heat. Once very hot, add vegetable oil, salt, and beans. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Add the seasoning mixture and stir-fry for another minute. Then add the sesame seeds and blend well.
6. Transfer the stir-fried string beans to a heated platter.
